Validation Scope

Flow * Verify that BIOS knobs are working properly, Bios Knobs: cstates will still use the existing ones( C6Enable, C1AutoDemotion, C1AutoUnDemotion, MonitorMWait, ProcessorC1eEnable)

TC 22022423030  | TCD 22022421247  | Feature tag: C-States / C6

HAS Spec Context â€” C-States (NWP NIO)
  • Supported C-states on NWP: C0, C1, C1e, C6 (per NWP PM MAS §3).
  • MC6 (Module C6): Module-level C-state for NWP NIO; equivalent to the C6 residency aggregation across all modules in the NIO die.
  • Key MSRs: 0xE2 (C-state limit), 0x3F8 (C3 residency), 0x3F9 (C6/C7 residency), 0x660-0x669 (per-core residency).
  • C6 flavours: C6A (Autonomous â€” no OS hint needed), C6S (Snoop â€” snoopable), C6S-P (Snoop + PHY).
  • Demotion: Acode-driven C6â†’C1 and C1â†’C1e demotion based on PM policies programmed at boot.
  • Spec refs: NWP AIPM HAS, NWP PM MAS §3 (Core C-States).
âš  NWP Delta from DMR â€” Register Path and Topology
  • Register path: DMR sv.socket0.imh0.* / sv.socket0.imh1.* â†’ NWP sv.socket0.nio0.*
  • Single NIO die (no imh0/imh1 split) â€” NWP has one IMH instance (NIO).
  • No PkgC6 on NWP (FUSE_PKG_C_STATE=0) â€” cross-product tests with PC6 are N/A.
  • Fast C1E: Supported per NWP PM MAS §3; PRD had flagged as TBD â€” use MAS as authoritative.
  • Solar references in some TCs are DMR-CBB-mesh specific and may not apply to NWP.

Pcode uses the granted freq for each domain to compute perf limit reasons. However, the granted freq can be lower when the domain enters an idle state.

For ex: granted freq is 0 when the core is in C6. When the core is in this state, Pcode can falsely set perf limit reasons.

Pcode must ensure that all perf limit reason computation only happen when the domain is active.

When the domain is an idle state, it must not set the perf limit reason bits falsely.

CBB CCP PM Integration HAS



NamePCU_CR_PKG_C_STATE_LIMIT_REQ
Size32
Address Offset0x46c4
Restore GroupVCCSAGPCU_FCLK
S0ix Saveregular
SAI GroupPUNIT_P_U_CODE_SAI_POLICY
Description

This CR contains fields that apply to Core C-State and Package C-State.

The following fields apply to Core C-State: AUTODEM2C1EN AUTODEM2C3EN ENC1UNDEMOTION ENC3UNDEMOTION

The following fields apply to Package C-State: C_STATE_MAX_LIMIT

PCODE will sample this register at slow loop.
BitsAccessDefaultDescription
3:0RW/P0x8

C_STATE_MAX_LIMIT

Limits the resolved package state to be lower/equal the noted state. During reset PCODE will write the value from FUSE_PKG_C_STATE to this field. This will be the default value that a RDMSR will obtain. Reset UCODE will read this value in order to configure SCP_CR_CLOCK_CST_CONFIG_CONTROL. At Runtime, SW can modify this value via WRMSR to CLOCK_CST_CONFIG_CONTROL_MSR. The MSR/CR will reflect the value that SW wrote. However, PCODE needs to always use the minimum between this value and FUSE_PKG_C_STATE. The field encodings are identical to those in FUSE_PKG_C_STATE.
7:4RW/P0x8

FUSED_PKGC_STATE_MAX_LIMIT

This value is loaded by PCODE from FUSE_PKG_C_STATE during reset. This value is a fuse limit to the allowed Package C-State. Encoding Description 0000b C0/C1 0001b C2 0010b C3 0011b C6 0100b C7 0101b C7S 0110b C8 0111b C9 1000b No Limit Otherwise Undefined Behaviour.
24:23RW0x0

C1_DEMOTION_POLICY

Defines the policy for C1 Demotion Algorithm enabled by bit[26]. Lower value biases towards higher demotions. 00: Most Agressive (Highest Demotions). 11: Most Conservative (Lowest Demotions).
25:25RW0x0

AUTODEM2C3EN

This bit enables demotion from C6/C7 to C3 based on processor C-state residency heuristics. It is updated by UCODE whenever BIOS writes to CLK_CST_CONFIG_CONTROL_MSR. PCODE will read this value and use it to activate the proper demotion heuristics in its code.
26:26RW0x0

AUTODEM2C1EN

This bit enables demotion from C6/C7 to C1 based on processor C-state residency heuristics. It is updated by UCODE whenever BIOS writes to CLK_CST_CONFIG_CONTROL_MSR. PCODE will read this value and use it to activate the proper demotion heuristics in its code.
27:27RW0x0

ENC3UNDEMOTION

Enable Un-Demotion from Demoted C3.
28:28RW0x0

ENC1UNDEMOTION

Enable Un-Demotion from Demoted C1.
29:29RW0x0

ENPKGCAUTODEMOTION

Enables use of history of past pkg cstate depth and residence as a factor in determining cstate depth.
30:30RW0x0

ENPKGCUNDEMOTION

Enable to consider cases where demotion was the incorrect desicion in determining cstate depth.

EnableYes1
